title: dianthus borbasii subsp. capitellatus
intro: Dianthus borbasii subsp. capitellatus, also known as the Balkan pink, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Dianthus borbasii subsp. capitellatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
